description: A Foundation CSS callout box used to display alert or informational messages, supporting colour-scheme variants such as secondary.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Secondary callout with an error message paragraph

props.children: There has been a problem showing this information. Please try again later.
Please be aware this page content may change.

notes: Foundation CSS callout component. All observed samples use the .secondary modifier. The variant prop appends the corresponding class to the root element alongside the base .callout class (e.g. class="callout secondary"). Content is free-form via children.
